name: Records Management (File Plan)
description: Records-management file plan / classification scheme — a nested-set tree of classification nodes (function/series/file) with retention and disposal-action metadata. PSIS-parity port of the Heratio ahg-records-manage FilePlanService (#118). Email capture and full disposal/retention execution are follow-ups.
author: The Archive and Heritage Group (Pty) Ltd

suggests.ahgExtendedRightsPlugin: Link file-plan nodes to retention schedules and disposal workflow
suggests.ahgNARSSAPlugin: Generate NARSSA transfer manifests for nodes whose disposal action is transfer
